bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=committee-chair (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 0 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-29 · [research_task] 调查 Nikkei 225 数据的孤儿证据问题

IN_PROGRESS

根据报告 [E14]，Nikkei 225 数据的证据回引为孤儿证据，需要核实其与 01 及 05 文件的关联性。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-29 · [fact_correction] 修正 USD/CNH 汇率跨源不一致问题

IN_PROGRESS

研究档案 中的 6.8019 与 研究档案 第 58 行的 6.8034 不一致，需进行修正。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-29 · [cross_analyst_review] 协调市场涨跌家数口径不一致问题

IN_PROGRESS

研究档案 中的上涨 756、下跌 4394 与 02/03 文件的 790/4676 不一致，需核查并统一数据。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-29 · [research_task] Follow up on CNH liquidity and FX settlement impacts

IN_PROGRESS · owner=fx-strategist

Following the analysis of CNH liquidity signals and USD/CNH settlement surpluses [Source: Theme 3], follow-up is required from the fx-strategist.

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-29 · [research_task] Follow up on China's OMO easing and A-share allocation

IN_PROGRESS · owner=bond-analyst

Following the analysis of deepened US-China yield inversion and its impact on CGB/A-share allocation [Source: Theme 3], follow-up is required from the bond-analyst.

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-29 · [research_task] Determine core CPI transmission from Hormuz oil shock

IN_PROGRESS · owner=chief-economist

The global macro analyst argues the Hormuz blockade is a level supply-side shock and warns of policy error, while indicators from the chief economist suggest sticky inflation. The final verdict on core CPI transmission is referred to the chief economist. [Source: Theme 2]

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-29 · [research_task] 监控 USD/CNH 与中间价偏离度以判断降息预期

IN_PROGRESS

跟踪今日盘中 USD/CNH 6.8019 与中间价 6.8166 的偏离，判断降息交易是否需要降温。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-28 · [research_task] 查找证明 PQC 与后量子密码业务相关的文件

IN_PROGRESS

查找明确证明 PQC 与后量子密码业务相关的文件，以判断 NIST、OMB、CISA 等政策是否构成实质顺风。见报告『风险与核验优先级』第 5 项。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-28 · [research_task] 搜寻董事会公告、股东大会资料或公司行动公告

IN_PROGRESS

搜寻董事会公告、股东 Hi 股东大会资料、股权激励计划或公司行动公告，以判断 M&A、重组、回购、增发和激励计划。见报告『风险与核验优先级』第 4 项。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-28 · [research_task] 获取 PQC 最近一期年报、季报或上市文件

IN_PROGRESS

获取最近一期年报、季报或上市文件，以建立收入基准、利润基准和事件影响幅度。见报告『风险与核验优先级』第 3 项。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-28 · [research_task] 寻找 PQC 官网、投资者关系页或新闻稿页

IN_PROGRESS

寻找公司官网、投资者关系页或新闻稿页，以判断新产品、订单、客户合作和业务线进展。见报告『风险与核验优先级』第 2 项。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-28 · [coverage_followup] 核实 PQC 的交易所确认页、证券全称、ISIN、FIGI 或 CIK

IN_PROGRESS

需要补充 PQC 的交易所确认页、证券全称、ISIN、FIGI 或 CIK，以确认可跟踪的 earnings 日期、公告渠道和监管披露入口。见报告『风险与核验优先级』第 1 项。

  • Status: in progress
